title: EB-5 verified claim
description: One material claim extracted from issuer/attorney documents, with its independent-verification verdict and citations. Produced by the specialist sub-agents.

claim_text.description: The claim as the issuer states it.

source_of_claim.description: Where the ISSUER said it (e.g. 'PPM p.42', 'RC website /projects'). NEVER counts as a verifying citation.

material.description: Is this claim outcome-critical? Material CONTRADICTED claims can trigger a hard gate.

confidence.description: 0 issuer-only/none .. 3 gov/court primary. Must be 0 if no non-issuer tier>=2 citation exists.

factor.description: Rubric factor id this claim informs, e.g. 'I2' or 'F4'.

subscore.description: This claim's contribution to the factor sub-score (0 best .. 100 worst). Null if the claim is contextual only.

note.description: Analyst note: how the verdict was reached; for CONTRADICTED, the issuer's framing vs reality.

citations.description: Independent sources. For a VERIFIED verdict at confidence>=2 there must be at least one non-issuer citation of tier>=2.

accessed.description: ISO date the source was accessed, e.g. 2026-06-19.

is_issuer.description: True if this source is the issuer/attorney/affiliate. Such sources cannot satisfy the verification credit rule.
